changelog: v1.7.1: Performance hotfix — eliminated UI freezes on copy/paste (async buffered logger, non-blocking clipboard handler, async paste retries). Fixed Cloudflare tunnel verification (5 attempts, 12s timeout). Removed auto-update at startup (manual only). Fixed Check for Updates button race condition. Reduced heartbeat/log spam. Android: Fixed missing icons, PDFs first, screenshot detection, blank box cleanup, modular refactor.
